{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Ben
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Ben]] is the name [[Teranon]] uses to address [[Benri]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“You shouldn’t have called me, Ben,” Teranon sighed.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
